metadata.title: Happy Birthday (DnB)
metadata.description: Happy Birthday, but actually happy — and drum and bass. Music box plays the melody three times with escalating energy: gentle entrance over sparse drums, then full breakbeat with rolling sub bass and glockenspiel arpeggios, then the melody leaps up an octave for the peak celebration with double-time hats. D major for the triumphant character. Synthesized DrumKit for tight timing.
